description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a bold color palette of neon yellow, navy blue, gray, black, and white. The upper is constructed from a combination of synthetic leather and mesh, with neon yellow panels dominating the sides and collar, contrasted by navy blue on the toe box and tongue. The shoe has a thick, sculpted black and beige rubber sole with pronounced grooves and geometric cutouts, providing both style and traction. White laces are threaded through reinforced eyelets, and the collar is padded for ankle support. The heel and side panels include layered overlays for added durability and visual interest. The overall design is modern and sporty, suitable for urban environments and streetwear fashion.
description: A modern high-top sneaker with neon yellow, navy blue, and gray panels, thick sculpted sole, and white laces. The design is bold, sporty, and urban-focused.
description_view_0: Side view showing the neon yellow panels, black and beige sculpted sole, and layered overlays on the heel and midfoot.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the navy blue toe box, white laces in a criss-cross pattern, and padded tongue.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar neon yellow and navy blue color blocking, and visible sculpted sole details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the padded collar, layered heel overlays, and the heel section of the thick sole.
